Tests the Math.min function to verify it returns the smallest of the given numbers.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.min` function in JavaScript. The assertion checks that when `Math.min` is called with the arguments `5` and `-7`, it returns `-7`, which is the smallest of the two numbers. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating the correct operation of the `Math.min` function with specific input values. The use of an assertion indicates that this code is intended for testing purposes, ensuring that the function behaves as expected.
